summary: Tested print/export disclaimer styling, EvidenceSummary garbage filtering, iOS PDF export session_token fix, and reduced font sizes. All features verified working correctly through code review and UI testing.
critical_code_review_comments: EvidenceSummary.jsx: extractText function correctly filters garbage strings containing 'document_id', 'filename', 'quote' concatenated together (line 12)
TimelineEnhanced.jsx: Print header fonts reduced - h1: 18px, h2: 15px (lines 246, 249)

GroundsOfMerit.jsx: Disclaimer CSS with #dc2626 bg, #facc15 hazard icon (lines 448, 493, 568-569)
ReportView.jsx: AlertTriangle icon uses text-yellow-300 class (line 1134), print disclaimer has #dc2626 bg and #facc15 icon (lines 788-789)
BarristerView.jsx: AlertTriangle icons use text-yellow-300 class (lines 955, 1081), print disclaimer has #dc2626 bg and #facc15 icon (lines 485-486)
CaseDetail.jsx: handleExportTimelinePDF appends session_token as query param for iOS devices (lines 438-440)
CaseDetail.jsx: buildPrintAllHtml disclaimer has #dc2626 bg, #facc15 hazard icon (lines 489-492, 503-504)
exportHtml.js: Disclaimer CSS with #dc2626 bg, #facc15 hazard icon (lines 55-56, 103)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All print/export disclaimer styling verified: bright red bg (#dc2626), white text, yellow hazard icon (#facc15/⚠). EvidenceSummary filters garbage strings. iOS PDF export appends session_token. Font sizes reduced in print views.

EvidenceSummary_garbage_filtering.details: extractText function filters strings containing 'document_id', 'filename', 'quote' concatenated together. UI test confirmed 3 evidence-summary components rendered without garbage strings.

BarristerView_print_disclaimer.details: Verified in code: .disclaimer-bold has background: #dc2626, .disc-icon has color: #facc15, on-screen AlertTriangle uses text-yellow-300

exportHtml_disclaimer.details: Verified in code: .disclaimer has background: #dc2626, .disc-hazard has color: #facc15, ⚠ character
